summary: Tested AI execute-action endpoint for creating events/tasks via AI Chat. Backend API works correctly (11/11 tests passed). The reported issue is NOT a code bug but a CONFIGURATION issue - the OpenAI API key is invalid (sk-test...2345). Without a working AI service, the system cannot parse natural language into structured event/task data.

root_cause_analysis.reported_issue: KI-Assistent sagt, er hat Termine/Tasks erstellt, aber sie werden nicht gespeichert
root_cause_analysis.actual_cause: OpenAI API key is invalid (sk-test...2345). The AI service is required to parse natural language ('morgen um 14 Uhr') into structured data (date: 2026-04-09, time: 14:00). Without working AI, parse_action_data() fails and no action_preview is returned to the frontend.
evidence: Frontend shows error: 'OpenAI Fehler: Ungültiger API-Key'
Backend API /api/ai/execute-action works correctly when called directly with structured data

action_items: Configure a valid OpenAI API key in Settings -> KI-Konfiguration
OR set up Ollama as local AI alternative
The code is working correctly - no code changes needed
critical_code_review_comments: The AI action flow requires AI service to parse natural language - this is by design and correct
Consider adding a fallback message when AI fails to parse action data, explaining that AI configuration is needed
seed_data_creation: Test events/tasks created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: The AI execute-action API works correctly. The issue is that OpenAI API key is invalid. To test the full AI chat flow, a valid OpenAI API key must be configured in Settings -> KI-Konfiguration. Manual event/task creation via /api/events and /api/tasks works correctly.

api_ai_execute_action_create_event.test: Creates event in DB and returns in /api/events

api_ai_execute_action_create_task.test: Creates task in DB and returns in /api/tasks

ai_chat_action_detection.note: Action intent detection works, but AI parsing fails due to invalid API key

frontend_ai_chat.reason: OpenAI API key invalid - shows error 'OpenAI Fehler: Ungültiger API-Key'
